scope_statement: This campaign exercised disposable local fixture state only. It did not launch DAZ, WSL, Docker, GPU work, or mutate F:\DAZ. It is implementation and recovery-contract evidence, not the final D11 live campaign.
command: python -m maskfactory.cli daz failure-campaign run --config-root configs/daz --policy configs/daz/failure_campaign.yaml --runtime-policy configs/daz/runtime.yaml --workspace C:\MaskFactory_FailureCampaigns\failure_campaign_mf_p9_12_06_20260719 --campaign-id failure_campaign_mf_p9_12_06_20260719 --apply

observed.reason: required storage root unavailable; pause and drain before acceptance

validation.broader_daz_selection: Collection proved 1340 selected DAZ-related tests. Four broad runs detached from their command sessions and remained active without final summaries; the exact owned pytest PIDs were stopped and OWNED_PYTEST_REMAINING=0. No broad pass or failure is inferred.

remaining_before_complete: Run the governed live-safe/system campaign required by D11 when all dependent runtime and champion gates are available.
Obtain a complete bounded broader DAZ regression result; do not infer success or failure from the detached runs.
Retain the final live evidence for disk-fill/GPU-contention branches governed by D11.
